title: Sunflower Chickpea Sandwiches
subtitle: with Dijon Mustard & Radishes
ingredients: 2 tbsp Follow Your Heart® Soy-Free Vegenaise®

steps.text: Drain and rinse the chickpeas. Halve and juice the lemon. Thinly slice the radishes. Add chickpeas to a large bowl and mash with a fork. Add lemon juice, Vegenaise, Dijon mustard, sunflower seeds, and a pinch of salt and pepper, and stir.

Toast the sourdough bread. To assemble the sandwiches, top one slice of sourdough toast with some of the sunflower chickpea salad and sliced radishes. Add a slice of sourdough toast to close the sandwich. Repeat to make the second sandwich.
